recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Dan in Real Life

recommendations.title: Corporate
recommendations.overview: Emilie is a bright young workaholic manager in Human Resources, working for a huge French agro-food company. But, one day, one of the employees commits suicide at the company in front of her. While an investigation is underway, stuck between her trau

recommendations.title: The Heist of the Century
recommendations.overview: In 2006, a group of thieves performed what is considered one of the most famous and smart bank heists in the history of Argentina. How they robbed the Rio bank is as surprising as what happened afterwards. This is their story.

recommendations.title: The Town

recommendations.title: Maudie
recommendations.overview: Canadian folk artist Maud Lewis falls in love with a fishmonger while working for him as a live-in housekeeper.

recommendations.title: In China They Eat Dogs
recommendations.overview: Arvid is an ordinary bank clerk who lives a rather unassuming life with his dear girlfriend. But his life is turned completely upside down when he bravely manages to avert a robbery against the bank where he works.

recommendations.title: UHF
recommendations.overview: The eccentric new manager of a UHF television channel tries to save the station from financial ruin with an odd array of programming.
